projects.name: Simple Calculator
projects.description: Build a command-line calculator that performs basic arithmetic operations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. The project teaches fundamental Python concepts like functions, user input handling, and error handling for division by zero.

projects.name: Number Guessing Game
projects.description: Create an interactive game where the player guesses a randomly generated number. The game includes difficulty levels, attempt tracking, and hints to guide the player.

projects.name: To-Do List Using Dictionary
projects.description: Build a task management application using dictionaries to store tasks with priorities and status. Features include adding, viewing, completing, and deleting tasks with persistent storage.
learning_outcomes: Save and load data from files

projects.name: Hangman Game
projects.description: Develop the classic word-guessing game where players guess letters to reveal a hidden word. Includes word categories, lives system, and visual feedback.

projects.name: Bank Management System
projects.description: Create a comprehensive banking application with account creation, deposits, withdrawals, fund transfers, transaction history, and interest calculation using OOP principles.

projects.name: Quiz Application
projects.description: Build an interactive quiz app with multiple-choice questions, scoring system, time limits, and support for multiple difficulty levels. Questions are loaded from JSON files.

projects.name: Contact Book with JSON Storage
projects.description: Create a contact management system that stores contacts in JSON format. Features include adding, searching, editing, deleting contacts, and grouping by categories.

projects.name: Expense Tracker
projects.description: Develop an application to track personal expenses with categories, date ranges, reports, and data visualization using matplotlib. Includes budget setting and alerts.

projects.name: Web Scraper
projects.description: Build a robust web scraper using BeautifulSoup and requests to extract structured data from websites. Includes handling pagination, rate limiting, and data export to CSV.

projects.name: REST API using Flask
projects.description: Create a production-ready RESTful API with Flask including JWT authentication, database integration with SQLAlchemy, request validation, and comprehensive documentation.

projects.name: Data Analysis Project
projects.description: Perform comprehensive data analysis on real-world datasets using pandas, numpy, and visualization libraries. Includes data cleaning, exploratory analysis, statistical testing, and interactive dashboards.

projects.name: E-commerce Backend System
projects.description: Build a complete e-commerce backend with Django REST Framework including product management, shopping cart, order processing, payment integration, and admin dashboard.

projects.name: Machine Learning Classifier
projects.description: Develop and deploy a machine learning model using scikit-learn. Includes data preprocessing, feature engineering, model selection, hyperparameter tuning, and deployment with FastAPI.

projects.name: Real-time Chat Application
projects.description: Create a real-time chat application using WebSockets with asyncio. Includes user authentication, multiple rooms, message persistence, and live notifications.

projects.name: Task Queue with Celery
projects.description: Build a distributed task queue system using Celery and Redis for handling background jobs, scheduled tasks, and parallel processing.
